title: TSMC Q2 revenue up 15% as advanced nodes stay tight
author: Mark Wang
body: TSMC (2330) reported Q2 consolidated revenue up 15% year over year, ahead of consensus. Analysts point to sustained demand for advanced nodes and raised price targets by 8%. The company said 3nm utilization remains at a high level, with AI-related order visibility now extending into H1 2027. Capex guidance for FY2026 was left unchanged at $34B.

title: MediaTek unveils automotive chip aimed at smart cockpits
author: Grace Lin
body: MediaTek (2454) launched a new automotive platform today targeting smart cockpit and ADAS workloads. The company expects automotive revenue to contribute meaningfully from Q4, with annual growth of up to 30%. A foreign brokerage note argued the automotive push could become MediaTek's next growth engine, though margins are expected to lag the handset business by roughly 4%.

title: Central bank holds rates, keeps housing curbs in place
author: Howard Chen
body: The central bank board voted to hold the policy rate steady, leaving the rediscount rate at 2%. The governor said inflation pressure has eased but still warrants monitoring, and that the fifth round of selective credit controls will stay in force. Mortgage loan-to-value caps will not be relaxed this quarter. Q3 GDP growth is still projected at 2.8%.
